html:
2026-0434
2026-05-08PS, EMCREmergency Management ActProvincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 295, YukonProvincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 295 in order to (1) declare the natural disaster to be of concern to the federal government; and (2) authorize the provision of financial assistance to Yukon with respect to the flood that occurred in Yukon, in April 2025.N/A
subject: Provincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 295, Yukon
precis: Provincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 295 in order to (1) declare the natural disaster to be of concern to the federal government; and (2) authorize the provision of financial assistance to Yukon with respect to the flood that occurred in Yukon, in April 2025.
